title: Replace a single Routes.user_path with the ~p sigil
prompt: The fixture below is a pre-1.7 Phoenix LiveView that uses Routes.user_path and <%= live_patch %> helpers. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/user_list_live.ex that replaces the helpers with Phoenix 1.7+ idioms: use the ~p sigil for every route, use <.link navigate={...}> in the template, use :for attribute instead of <%= for %>, and convert to ~H sigil. Keep the module name MyAppWeb.UserListLive and the same behavior.
tier_rationale: Single-step idiom swap. Pattern is well-known (Routes.user_path -> ~p). Vanilla Sonnet can usually one-shot it when the old form is obvious.
research_citation: fly.io Migrating to Verified Routes + fly.io Migrating to LiveView v0.18
